Research & Interests

I'm a computer science student at Mahindra University with a deep interest in machine learning, artificial intelligence, and emerging technologies. I enjoy building practical applications — from mobile tools that work offline to ML-powered solvers and 3D physics games. Outside of code, I follow cricket, play badminton, and am always exploring the latest in AI research.

Train Tracking Mobile Application
Python  ·  Maps API  ·  May 2025
View on GitHub
  • Mobile application to view train timings and details in offline mode using locally stored data.

Sudoku Solver
Python  ·  Machine Learning  ·  Dec 2025
View on GitHub
  • Automatically solves any 9×9 Sudoku puzzle, ensuring numbers 1–9 appear without repetition in rows, columns, and boxes.
  • ML-based image recognition to detect and parse the Sudoku grid directly from a photo.
  • Solving algorithm processes the recognised grid and displays the completed solution automatically.
  • Resolved challenges with asynchronous task handling for a smooth user experience.
3D Ball Control Game
Unity  ·  C  ·  Nov 2025
View on GitHub
  • 3D physics-based game built in Unity with smooth player movement and responsive camera tracking.
  • Gameplay mechanics include respawn system, level progression, and collision-based triggers.
  • Tech stack: Unity Engine, C, Rigidbody Physics, Physics Engine.
